level_44_before.text_en: The marathon: hold Andromeda steady longer than ever, fingertips only.
level_44_before.text_zh: 马拉松来了：只用指尖，让仙女座稳定得比以往任何时候都久。

level_44_after.speaker: Maya
level_44_after.text_en: A galaxy, held steady by hand. But you also felt the limit: for tiny planetary detail we need MORE focal length, and a Dobsonian tube would grow absurdly long.
level_44_after.text_zh: 一个星系，被你用手稳稳看住。但你也感到了极限：想看行星的微小细节需要更长的焦距，而多布森的镜筒会因此变得长得离谱。

level_43_before.speaker: Maya
level_43_before.text_en: Everything at once tonight: focus, track, choose the eyepiece. No single skill - a session.
level_43_before.text_zh: 今晚全都要：调焦、追踪、选目镜。考的不是单项，是一整场观测。

level_43_after.speaker: Maya
level_43_after.text_en: That was a real observer's session, start to finish.
level_43_after.text_zh: 这是一场真正观测者的完整观测。

level_42_before.speaker: Maya
level_42_before.text_en: Low Mars again - apply the discipline: lower power, wait for the still air.
level_42_before.text_zh: 又是低空火星——拿出纪律：降低倍率，等大气平静。

level_42_after.speaker: Maya
level_42_after.text_en: Same lesson, new telescope, better hands.
level_42_after.text_zh: 同一课，换了望远镜，手上功夫更好了。

level_41_before.speaker: Maya
level_41_before.text_en: Clouds tonight. Do not fight them - watch the gaps and strike when the sky opens.
level_41_before.text_zh: 今晚有云。不要跟它们较劲——盯住云缝，天空放开时果断出手。

level_41_after.speaker: Maya
level_41_after.text_en: Patience beat the weather. That skill transfers to every telescope you will ever own.
level_41_after.text_zh: 耐心赢了天气。这个本事在你未来的每一台望远镜上都用得上。

level_40_before.speaker: Maya
level_40_before.text_en: The Andromeda Galaxy is huge but faint — perfect for the Dobsonian's wide field and big mirror. Relax your eyes and take in the whole glow.
level_40_before.text_zh: 仙女座星系又大又暗——正适合多布森的宽视场和大主镜。放松眼睛，把整片光晕收进视野。

level_40_after.speaker: Maya
level_40_after.text_en: The whole galaxy in one field. Wide and bright beats big and dim - for targets like this.
level_40_after.text_zh: 整个星系装进一个视场。对这样的目标，又宽又亮胜过又大又暗。

level_39_before.speaker: Maya
level_39_before.text_en: Observers call these big Dobsonians 'light buckets'. Point yours at Orion and see why the nickname stuck.
level_39_before.text_zh: 观测者把大多布森叫作"光之水桶"。把它对准猎户座，看看这外号是怎么来的。

level_39_after.speaker: Maya
level_39_after.text_en: A bucket of light, held by hand. Deep sky was never about fancy mounts.
level_39_after.text_zh: 满满一桶光，用手捧着。深空观测从来不靠花哨的支架。

level_38_before.speaker: Maya
level_38_before.text_en: Longer hold tonight. Push, wait, push - let the rhythm become boring. Boring means mastered.
level_38_before.text_zh: 今晚保持得更久。推、等、推——让节奏变得无聊。无聊就意味着掌握。

level_38_after.speaker: Maya
level_38_after.text_en: Eight steady seconds by hand. The sky moved; you answered.
level_38_after.text_zh: 手动稳稳保持八秒。天空在动,你在回应。

level_37_before.speaker: Maya
level_37_before.text_en: Why Jupiter for your first hand-tracking night? It drifts fast and rewards you with detail only while centered - the perfect target to train your hands on.
level_37_before.text_zh: 为什么第一次手动追踪选木星？它漂移得快，而且只有居中时才把细节给你看——正是训练双手的完美靶子。

level_37_before.speaker: Maya
level_37_before.text_en: Jupiter tonight. Earth's rotation will slide it out of your view again and again. With a Dobsonian you nudge the tube by hand — small, gentle pushes.
level_37_before.text_zh: 今晚看木星。地球自转会一次又一次把它滑出你的视野。用多布森，你要用手轻推镜筒——小幅、轻柔地修正。

level_37_before.speaker: Maya
level_37_before.text_en: Push too hard and you'll overshoot; wait too long and it drifts away. Find the rhythm.
level_37_before.text_zh: 推得太猛会过头；等得太久它就漂走了。找到那个节奏。

level_37_after.speaker: Maya
level_37_after.text_en: You kept a planet centered with nothing but your fingertips. Every Dobsonian owner in the world knows that rhythm.
level_37_after.text_zh: 你只靠指尖让一颗行星保持居中。全世界每个多布森用户都懂这种节奏。

level_36_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_36_before_assembly.text_en: A Dobsonian is a Newtonian mirror in the simplest possible cradle: a rocker box that swivels left-right and tilts up-down. No tripod, no counterweights.
level_36_before_assembly.text_zh: 多布森就是把牛顿镜的镜筒放进最简单的摇篮：一个能左右旋转、上下俯仰的摇箱底座。没有三脚架，也没有配重。

level_36_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_36_before_assembly.text_en: That simplicity buys you a BIG mirror for very little money and setup time. The price: nothing tracks the sky for you. Your hands are the motor.
level_36_before_assembly.text_zh: 这种简单换来的是：用很少的钱和时间就能架起一面大镜子。代价是：没有任何东西替你追踪天空。你的双手就是马达。

level_36_before_assembly.speaker: Maya
level_36_before_assembly.text_en: Build it on the Assembly Table — you'll notice how few parts it needs.
level_36_before_assembly.text_zh: 去组装台把它装起来——你会注意到它需要的零件有多少。

level_36_after.speaker: Maya
level_36_after.text_en: Assembled in minutes — that's the Dobsonian promise. Now let's find out what 'no tracking' really means at the eyepiece.
level_36_after.text_zh: 几分钟就装好了——这就是多布森的承诺。现在去目镜后面体会一下"没有追踪"到底意味着什么。

level_35_before.speaker: Maya
level_35_before.text_en: Newtonian final exam: collimate, center, hold, observe. Show me everything from the last nine lessons.
level_35_before.text_zh: 牛顿镜结业考：准直、居中、保持、观测。把过去九课的东西全部拿出来。

level_35_after.speaker: Maya
level_35_after.text_en: Graduated. The Newtonian gave you color-free light and a big cheap mirror - at the price of collimation and care.
level_35_after.text_zh: 毕业了。牛顿镜给了你无色差的光和便宜的大口径——代价是准直和维护。

level_35_after.speaker: Maya
level_35_after.text_en: But its equatorial mount is heavy and fussy. Next crate: a design that throws all of that away. The Dobsonian.
level_35_after.text_zh: 但它的赤道式支架又重又麻烦。下一个板条箱里，是把这些全部扔掉的设计：多布森。

level_34_before.speaker: Maya
level_34_before.text_en: Tonight, Betelgeuse - a red supergiant. Through the old refractor its edge would bleed blue and red. Look at what your mirror shows instead.
level_34_before.text_zh: 今晚看参宿四——一颗红超巨星。透过旧折射镜，它的边缘会渗出红蓝杂色。看看你的镜面给出的是什么。

level_34_before.speaker: Maya
level_34_before.text_en: That deep orange is the star's OWN color: a surface cooler than our Sun. No lens is lying to you anymore.
level_34_before.text_zh: 那种深橙色是恒星自己的颜色：一个比太阳更冷的表面。再没有透镜对你说谎了。

level_34_after.speaker: Maya
level_34_after.text_en: You just read a star's temperature with your eyes - possible only because the mirror adds no false color. Tomorrow: your Newtonian final.
level_34_after.text_zh: 你刚用眼睛读出了一颗恒星的温度——这只有在镜面不添加虚假颜色时才可能。明天：牛顿镜结业考。
